title: Module 1
content:
Process Control Loops: Feedback control, feed forward control, Cascade
control, Ratio control, Split range control. Computerized control: Basic
building blocks of Computer controlled systems
Programmable Logic Controller: Architecture of PLC, Types of PLC, PLC
modules, Input and output modules - Analog and discrete I/O modules,
Examples of Digital and Analog Inputs/Outputs- PLC Configuration- Scan
cycle, Capabilities of PLC, Selection criteria for PLC, PLC communication
with PC and software, Power supply of PLCs, PLC Wiring- Installation of
PLC and its modules.

title: Module 2
content:
PLC programming languages, Ladder programming, Functional Block
Diagram, Sequential Flowchart SFC, Structured Text, Instruction List, Relay
logic, Timers and counters, simple programs in PLC – ladder programming,
math operations, sequencers, program control instructions, PTO/PWM
generation.
PLC Networking, Networking standards & IEEE standards, Protocols –
Ethernet, PROFIBUS, CANopen
Case studies – PLC based traffic light system, stepper motor & servo motor
control using PLC, Analog sensor interfacing with PLC, Encoder interfacing
with PLC, bottle filling system, gate control system

title: Module 3
content:
SCADA: SCADA Fundamentals: Introduction, Types, Open system: Need
and advantages, Building blocks of SCADA systems, Remote terminal unit
(RTU),
Human-Machine
Interface
(HMI)
subsystem.
SCADA
communication
systems,
Master
Station:
Master
station
software
components, Master station hardware components, Server systems in the
master station, small, medium, and large master stations, software
architecture of SCADA, Interfacing of SCADA with PLC, drive and other
field devices.
Distributed Control System: DCS - Architectures, Comparison, Local control
unit, Process interfacing issues, Communication facilities. Various function
Blocks.

title: Module 4
content:
LCU communication Facilities - Communication system requirements –
Architectural Issues, Operator displays, Operator Interfaces – Engineering
Interfaces. Introduction to HART and Field bus protocol. Interfacing Smart
field devices (wired and wireless) with DCS controller. Introduction to
Object Linking and Embedding (OLE) for Process Control.
Case studies – Design of conveyor automation system using PLC, SCADA
and Electrical drive: Design of inspection automation system using sensors,
PLC and SCADA: Design of simple water management system using PLC,
SCADA and Electrical Drive
